info.name: [M] DBP API Reference v4
info.description:
Fast, easy, and free API access to video, audio, and text Bibles.

Contact Support:
 Email: support@digitalbibleplatform.com

item.name: Languages
Returns Alphabets

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

request.description: Returns a list of the world's known scripts. This route might be useful to you if you'd like to query information about fonts, alphabets, and the world's writing systems. Some fileset returns may not display correctly without a font delivered by these via the `alphabets/{script_id}` routes.

item.name: Return details on a single Alphabet

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)
(Required) The alphabet Script, which is used as the identifier

request.description: Returns a single alphabet along with whatever bibles and languages using it.

response.name: successful operation

item.name: Returns Languages

query.description: The ISO Country Code. For a complete list of Country codes,  please refer to the ISO Registration Authority. https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html
The iso code to filter languages by. For a complete list see the `iso` field in the `/languages` route
The language_name field will filter results by a specific language name
Include the ISO language ids for available translations

When set to a valid three letter language iso, the returning results will be localized in the language matching that iso. (If an applicable translation exists). For a complete list see the `iso` field in the `/languages` route
The current page of the results
The number of search results to return
(Required) The Version Number

request.description: Returns the List of Languages

item.name: Returns details on a single Language

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)
(Required) The language ID

request.description: Returns details on a single Language

response.name: successful operation
response.body:

 }

item.name: Return a range of numbers

query.description: (Required) The script_id to return numbers for
(Required) The start of the range to select for
(Required) The end of the range to select for
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

request.description: This route returns the vernacular numbers for a set range.

item.name: Return all Alphabets that have a custom number sets

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

request.description: Returns a range of numbers

response.name: successful operation

item.name: Return a single custom number set

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)
(Required) The NumeralSystem id

request.description: Returns a range of numbers

item.description: v4 Routes for obtaining Languages Data

item.name: Countries
Returns Countries

query.description: When set to a valid three letter language iso, the returning results will be localized in the language matching that iso. (If an applicable translation exists). For a complete list see the `iso` field in the `/languages` route
When set to true, the return will include the major languages used in each country.
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

request.description: Returns the List of Countries

item.name: Returns details for a single Country

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)
(Required)

request.description: Returns details for a single Country

item.name: Returns details for a single Country Copy

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)
(Required)

request.description: Returns details for a single Country

item.description: v4 Routes for obtaining Countries Data

item.name: Bibles
Returns audio timestamps for a chapter

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (Required) The specific fileset to return references for
(Required) The Book ID for which to return timestamps. For a complete list see the `book_id` field in the `/bibles/books` route.
(Required) The chapter for which to return timestamps

request.description: This route will return timestamps for a chapter. Note that the fileset id must be available via the path `/timestamps`. At first, only a few filesets may have timestamps metadata applied.

item.name: Returns content for a single fileset, book and chapter

query.description: Will filter the results by the given starting verse
Will filter the results by the given ending verse
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (Required) The fileset ID
(Required) Will filter the results by the given book. For a complete list see the `book_id` field in the `/bibles/books` route.
(Required) Will filter the results by the given chapter

request.description: For a given fileset, book and chapter, return content (text, audio or video)

item.name: Available fileset types

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

request.description: A list of all the file types that exist within the filesets

response.name: successful operation
response.body:
{
 "audio_drama": "Dramatized Audio",
 "audio": "Audio",
 "text_plain": "Plain Text",
 "text_format": "Formatted Text",
 "video_stream": "Video",
 "audio_stream": "Audio HLS Stream",
 "audio_drama_stream": "Dramatized Audio HLS Stream"
}

item.name: Returns Bibles based on filter criteria

query.description: The iso code to filter results by. This will return results only in the language specified. For a complete list see the `iso` field in the `/languages` route
Will filter bibles based upon the media type of their filesets
Will exclude bibles based upon the media type of their filesets
The current page of the results
The number of search results to return
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

request.description: The base bible route returning by default bibles and filesets that your key has access to

response.name: successful operation

item.name: Book information for a Bible

query.description: The book id. For a complete list see the `book_id` field in the `/bibles/books` route.
Filter all the books that have content
Retrieve how many verses the chapters of the books have
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)
(Required)

request.description: Returns a list of translated book names and general information for the given Bible. The actual list of books may vary from fileset to fileset. For example, a King James Fileset may contain deuterocanonical books that are missing from one of it's sibling filesets nested within the bible parent.

response.name: successful operation
response.body:
{
 "data": [

item.name: Default Bible for a language

query.description: The language code to filter results by
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

request.description: Returns default Bible for a language

item.name: Bible Copyright information

query.description: The iso code to filter organization translations by. For a complete list see the `iso` field in the `/languages` route.
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)
(Required) The Bible ID to retrieve the copyright information for

request.description: All bible fileset's copyright information and organizational connections

item.description: v4 Routes for obtaining Bibles Data

item.name: Audio Timing
Returns Bible Filesets which have audio timestamps

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

request.description: This call returns a list of fileset that have timestamp metadata associated with them. This data could be used to search audio bibles for a specific term, make karaoke verse & audio readings, or to jump to a specific location in an audio file.

item.name: Returns audio timestamps for a chapter

query.description: (Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (Required) The specific fileset to return references for
(Required) The Book ID for which to return timestamps. For a complete list see the `book_id` field in the `/bibles/books` route.
(Required) The chapter for which to return timestamps

request.description: This route will return timestamps for a chapter. Note that the fileset id must be available via the path `/timestamps`. At first, only a few filesets may have timestamps metadata applied.

item.description: v4 Routes for obtaining Audio timing information. This data could be used to search audio bibles for a specific term, make karaoke verse & audio readings, or to jump to a specific location in an audio file.

item.name: Search
Search a bible for a word

query.description: (Required) The word or phrase being searched
(Required) The Bible fileset ID
The number of search results to return
The current page of the results
The usfm book ids to search through separated by a comma
(Required) The Version Number

variable.description: (This can only be one of https)

response.name: successful operation
